title: Dashboard
subtitle: Track and analyze your vehicle expenses

expense.title: Expenses increased by 20%
expense.description: Your expenses this month are higher than your 6-month average. Review recent transactions.

maintenance.title: Maintenance due soon
maintenance.description: Your vehicle is approaching 15,000 km. Schedule an oil change within the next 500 km.

fuel_efficiency.title: Fuel efficiency improving
fuel_efficiency.description: Your cost per kilometer has decreased by 8% compared to last month.

optimization.title: Cost optimization tip
optimization.description: Consider switching to premium gas stations less frequently to save approximately $45/month.
